ledger_compact.severity: `critical` blocks unit + dependents + shared-surface parallel work; `major-local` blocks unit + direct dependents; `minor-local` records non-blocking nits only if no gate weakening; `clean` may feed dependents; `pending-live/BLOCKED` blocks final closure and any dependent live claim.
